data.body: Fix implemented: 1) Made all write_commit_event git rev-parse calls conditional on TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR (~15ms saved per write op), 2) In-process ticket_show for _tag_add/_tag_remove (saves ~30ms per tag op), 3) gc.auto skip via _DSO_GC_AUTO_ZERO env var from clone_ticket_repo (~10ms saved per write op), 4) Added aggregate_sprint_turn_linux_s: 3.5 to a0-baseline.json as Linux CI pre-refactor baseline, 5) Updated benchmark to use platform-specific baseline on Linux.
